notes: Made hosted Google login controls visible at the top of the homepage and added clearer messaging when Streamlit [auth] secrets are not configured.
Moved developer bootstrap emails out of public source code and into Streamlit secrets.
Protected beta and developer features now require a verified email claim from login.
Made app-created Pathmark sync sheets the primary Google Sheets OAuth workflow.
Moved existing sync sheet entry into an advanced section for testing only.
Clarified that the role store contains access records only, not user planning data.
